description: Bounding box(bbox) GIS tool: coords conversion, EPSG, WKT, GeoJSON, H3, Overpass, POI, map viz

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.iamvibhorsingh/bbox-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Mapbox token for natural-language location search (e.g. 'San Francisco')
environmentVariables.name: MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Custom Overpass API endpoint URL (defaults rotate between public instances)
environmentVariables.name: OVERPASS_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Safety cap for H3 grid generation (default: 50000)
environmentVariables.name: MAX_H3_CELLS
